languages.text: "За эти годы ты достиг многого. Почему ты все еще сомневаешься в себе? У тебя получится спасти Нунциуса. Цель оправдывает средства, пора двинуться к ней".
"You have accomplished a great deal over the years. Why do you still doubt yourself? You will succeed in saving Nuncius. The end justifies the means, so now you must move toward it."
languages.original_text: "За эти годы ты достиг многого. Почему ты все еще сомневаешься в себе? У тебя получится спасти Нунциуса. Цель оправдывает средства, пора двинуться к ней".

traits.locale_text: "You have accomplished a great deal over the years. Why do you still doubt yourself? You will succeed in saving Nuncius. The end justifies the means, so now you must move toward it."
"You have accomplished a great deal over the years. Why do you still doubt yourself? You will succeed in saving Nuncius. The end justifies the means, so now you must move toward it."
"You have accomplished a great deal over the years. Why do you still doubt yourself? You will succeed in saving Nuncius. The end justifies the means, so now you must move toward it."

languages.text: «Ha logrado grandes avances a lo largo de los años. ¿Por qué sigue dudando de sí mismo? Conseguirá salvar a Nuncius. El fin justifica los medios, solo le queda alcanzarlo».
languages.original_text: "You have accomplished a great deal over the years. Why do you still doubt yourself? You will succeed in saving Nuncius. The end justifies the means, so now you must move toward it."

traits.locale_text: «Ha logrado grandes avances a lo largo de los años. ¿Por qué sigue dudando de sí mismo? Conseguirá salvar a Nuncius. El fin justifica los medios, solo le queda alcanzarlo».

languages.text: “这些年来你达成了许多成就。为什么还要继续怀疑自己？你肯定能救下努恩修斯。目的决定手段的正当性，现在的你必须朝着那个方向前进。”
languages.original_text: "You have accomplished a great deal over the years. Why do you still doubt yourself? You will succeed in saving Nuncius. The end justifies the means, so now you must move toward it."

traits.locale_text: “这些年来你达成了许多成就。为什么还要继续怀疑自己？你肯定能救下努恩修斯。目的决定手段的正当性，现在的你必须朝着那个方向前进。”

languages.text: « Après tout ce que vous avez accompli au fil des ans, pourquoi doutez-vous encore de vos aptitudes ? Vous réussirez à sauver Nuncius. La fin justifie les moyens, à condition que vous cessiez de vous en détourner. »
languages.original_text: "You have accomplished a great deal over the years. Why do you still doubt yourself? You will succeed in saving Nuncius. The end justifies the means, so now you must move toward it."

traits.locale_text: « Après tout ce que vous avez accompli au fil des ans, pourquoi doutez-vous encore de vos aptitudes ? Vous réussirez à sauver Nuncius. La fin justifie les moyens, à condition que vous cessiez de vous en détourner. »

languages.text: "Yıllar içinde büyük işler başardın. Neden hâlâ kendinden şüphe ediyorsun? Nuncius'u kurtarmayı başaracaksın. Amaca giden her yol mübahtır, bu yüzden o amacı gerçekleştirmelisin."
languages.original_text: "You have accomplished a great deal over the years. Why do you still doubt yourself? You will succeed in saving Nuncius. The end justifies the means, so now you must move toward it."

traits.locale_text: "Yıllar içinde büyük işler başardın. Neden hâlâ kendinden şüphe ediyorsun? Nuncius'u kurtarmayı başaracaksın. Amaca giden her yol mübahtır, bu yüzden o amacı gerçekleştirmelisin."

languages.text: "Ihr habt im Laufe der Jahre große Erfolge gefeiert. Warum zweifelt Ihr noch an Euch? Ihr werdet Nuncius retten. Der Zweck heiligt die Mittel, daran müsst Ihr immer denken."
languages.original_text: "You have accomplished a great deal over the years. Why do you still doubt yourself? You will succeed in saving Nuncius. The end justifies the means, so now you must move toward it."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr habt im Laufe der Jahre große Erfolge gefeiert. Warum zweifelt Ihr noch an Euch? Ihr werdet Nuncius retten. Der Zweck heiligt die Mittel, daran müsst Ihr immer denken."

languages.text: "あなたは長年にわたって多くのことを成し遂げてきた。なぜまだ自分を疑うのですか？あなたはヌンシウスを救うことに成功するでしょう。目的は手段を正当化するものだ。
languages.original_text: "You have accomplished a great deal over the years. Why do you still doubt yourself? You will succeed in saving Nuncius. The end justifies the means, so now you must move toward it."
